description: A physical medicine physician needs to document cranial dimensions for an anthropometric assessment using the pre-loaded CT Cranium DICOM scan. Measure the maximum transverse (left-to-right) diameter and the maximum anteroposterior (front-to-back) diameter of the skull, ensuring each measurement spans from one inner cortical surface to the opposite side. Save the project to /home/ga/Documents/cranial_measurements.inv3. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
